title: Remove the Defender
summary: Take out the piece that holds theirs together

steps.title: The Key Defender
steps.text: Many tactics fail because one enemy piece defends everything. The fix: remove or trade it. Here Black's rook on f8 defends the back rank. If White takes the f7 pawn, the rook is diverted and the king is naked.

steps.prompt: Take the f7 pawn — it forces Black to react.
steps.hint: Rxf7 removes the defender of the back rank.

steps.title: What Follows
steps.text: Now Black must deal with the rook on f7. If Black trades with ...Rxf7, the back rank is still weak. Always ask: 'What holds their position together?' The answer is usually one specific piece.
